text: The pasta was incredible but we waited 50 minutes for a table we had reserved.
Quiet, clean, and the front desk remembered my name. I'd stay again without hesitation.
Battery lasts two days, camera is mediocre, screen scratches if you look at it wrong.
Delivery was three days late and the box was crushed. The plant inside survived somehow.
Exactly as described. No surprises, no delights. It's a toaster.
Our guide knew everything and the sunset from the ridge was unreal. Worth every step.
App keeps logging me out and support sent me the same canned reply three times.
Coffee's great, wifi's fast, but they start stacking chairs on you at 4:45.
Return process was painless and the refund landed the next morning. Rare these days.
The sequel abandons everything that made the first game special. Combat is fine, I guess.
Tiny portions, huge prices, and yet I keep coming back for that broth.
Instructions were clear, all parts labeled, assembled in twenty minutes flat.
Seat didn't recline and the entertainment screen was dead, but we landed early.
This blanket has ruined all other blankets for me.
Smells like burning plastic on the highest setting. Returning it tomorrow.
Mid. Just extremely mid in every conceivable way.
